title: BrandKitEvaluation
description: Schema for semantically evaluating an extracted Brand Kit.

evaluations.description: A list of evaluations for individual properties extracted from the brand kit.

property.description: The dot-notation path of the property evaluated (e.g., 'toneOfVoice.defaultStyle').

extractedContent.description: The actual value that was extracted and is being evaluated.

rating.description: The quality rating of the extracted content.

rationale.description: Explanation of the rating based on the schema requirements.

overallRating.description: The aggregate, final rating for the entire extracted Brand Kit.

summary.description: High-level summary of the semantic quality of the extracted brand kit.
